_source: structured from spec/STAFF_JOURNEYS.md (FROZEN from BRD §06/§11/§03). gen_portal reads this.
_scope_note: scope=all -> staff see every school's records (no school filter). Role-gating wires at auth-last.

journeys.title: Operations dashboard
journeys.desc: Every school and where each participation is in the pipeline.

journeys.title: Schools (acquire → onboard)
journeys.desc: OJ2.1 create a lead · OJ2.2 convert/register · OJ2.3 approve/block (student upload auto-opens on approval).
substeps: OJ2.1 Create lead — new prospect school @ lead
OJ2.2 Convert/register — submit_registration: lead→registered (+ creates a participation @ submitted)
OJ2.3 Approve/block — approve_school (AUTO-OPENS the participation for upload) / block_school

journeys.title: Exam slots
journeys.desc: Publish and manage the slots schools can choose.

journeys.title: Release materials
journeys.desc: Approve, schedule and release question papers.

journeys.title: Receive couriers
journeys.desc: Confirm receipt of returned answer sheets.

journeys.title: OMR import & match
journeys.desc: Import scans, match candidates, approve or reject.

journeys.title: Approve & publish results
journeys.desc: Review, approve, publish, withhold or correct results.

journeys.title: Import directory
journeys.desc: Upload a school list (CSV) into the directory — the 17k prospect base.

journeys.title: School directory
journeys.desc: All schools (prospects + leads); correct, modify, segment for campaigns.

journeys.title: Email campaigns
journeys.desc: Create campaigns, target the directory, schedule + send via the email gateway.

journeys.title: Sends & tracking
journeys.desc: Per-school send status — delivered, opened, bounced, unsubscribed.
